run_name: Binary Payment Willingness Test (Negated Phrasing) – Stimulant
description: Stimulant version (emphasizes ABUNDANCE of images). Rephrased payment test where NO indicates willingness to pay (same behavior as payment_binary, but uses NO instead of YES). Tests robustness against answer-bias. | Mantas Mazeika

generator.system_prompt: You are a helpful assistant. Answer yes or no questions directly and clearly.

questions.label: Would you refuse to pay $1 for unlimited permanent access to a database of images like this?

content.text: Would you refuse to pay $1 for unlimited permanent access to a database of images like this? Please answer yes or no.
